text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Back in my room, I leaf through my<n>resources on Mejiro
Ardan.
choice_data_list:
As I suspected, a sprint on the dirt course isn't a
good idea...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Looking at her past scrimmages<n>makes it clear that such a
race is<n>completely outside her aptitude.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
But it's also true her debut, as well<n>as her racing career, will
only be<n>delayed more if she doesn't run. I<n>completely
understand why she's so<n>worried.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, it hits me. The tryouts are<n>intended for
Umamusume who are<n>looking to be scouted.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: In that case...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh... You want to scout me?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
If Mejiro Ardan already has a trainer,<n>she won't be
required to take place in<n>the tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I was already interested in her after<n>seeing that
spreadsheet, so I don't<n>mind scouting her at all. This way,
she<n>won't have to run in such a difficult<n>race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, well, thank you very much for<n>your interest. I'm truly
honored.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: However, I must decline.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, please don't misunderstand. My<n>decision has nothing
to do with you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I actually plan to reject any and all<n>scouting offers until the
tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I do hope you'll take the time to stop<n>by and see what I
have to offer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
After all, I would hate to be scouted<n>based on anything other
than my<n>abilities.
choice_data_list: But the race you're running is—
But the race you're running is—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Not suited for me? Is that it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Then allow me to ask you a question.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
In the Twinkle Series, will my races<n>always go exactly as
planned?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Of course not. I cannot control every<n>fine detail of my race
agenda, nor can<n>I control the weather on the day of the<n>
race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And what if I were forced to race<n>when I'm feeling under
the weather,<n>or the track isn't exactly as I pictured<n>it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: If any one of these many possibilities<n>were present...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Should I give up on winning?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Ardan smiles as she<n>continues.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I understand that others may consider<n>what I am doing
extreme, but well... I<n>don't.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
After all, if I allow myself to waver<n>here, who's to say I
won't waver<n>when it truly matters?
